title: Coverage, Thresholds, and Meaningful Evidence · Policy Clinic: Coverage Kinds
summary: Set coverage policy that exposes risk without encouraging empty tests. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates coverage kinds increment in a changed-code coverage and exception policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Interpret line, branch, function, condition, and path coverage limitations.
Detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Build Coverage Kinds evidence
steps.instruction: Append a gates-coverage-kinds-15015w: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Coverage Kinds into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
gates-coverage-kinds-15015w:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.

steps.title: Defend the Coverage Kinds model

steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.
